<!--
Thank you for opening a PR to click. Read CLAUDE.md and DESIGN.md before starting.
Run `bun run ci` locally and make sure it passes before requesting review.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences. What changed and why. -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI / tooling

## TDD checklist (for `packages/core` changes)
- [ ] I wrote a failing test first (RED)
- [ ] I added the minimum code to make it pass (GREEN)
- [ ] I refactored with tests still green (REFACTOR)
- [ ] Coverage for `packages/core` is still 100%

## Quality checks
- [ ] `bun run ci` passes locally
- [ ] No new dependencies added (or each new dep is justified below)
- [ ] No new colors / fonts / spacing without a `DESIGN.md` update
- [ ] Accessibility: keyboard, focus, ARIA, contrast

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that requires special attention. -->
